name_en: Wow✨Twilly has so many uses. The most common use is wrapping around handbag handles. Girls with long hair can use it to tie their hair, super gentle ☺️. In summer, it can be a small scarf or tied around the wrist. It is a small accessory with many uses. This one, needless to say, is absolutely explosively good-looking 💥~
